overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing an NCPD officer walking through Night City's downtown district during dusk. The scene features neon-lit streets, futuristic architecture, digital billboards, and light pedestrian traffic as the character navigates from a covered sidewalk across an intersection and into a darker underpass area beneath highway overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beside a teal commercial building with illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: large teal-colored commercial building with corrugated metal panels and digital displays
large illuminated advertisement displaying 'LIFE IS TOO SHORT TO BE SLOW' in yellow text
metal safety railing with black and yellow striped posts separating sidewalk from street
futuristic enclosed walkway spanning across the street ahead
tall cylindrical building with multiple illuminated windows and balconies

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered commercial sidewalk next to a teal building featuring large digital billboards. The camera moves forward past a few seated individuals on the left, with a metal railing separating the walkway from the street where sparse traffic passes by. The atmosphere is mixed lighting from the setting sun and artificial neon signs.

events.description: turns right from covered sidewalk into open intersection to cross the street
red sports car passes through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk, following the NCPD officer to the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer walking ahead of the camera, leading the way across the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow parallel stripes on dark asphalt
building with curved corner facade featuring multiple air conditioning units and signage
tall traffic signal post with illuminated lights at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character turns right from the covered walkway into an open intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while following an NCPD officer. A red sports car passes through the intersection as the camera moves from the sheltered sidewalk into the exposed street crossing, with buildings visible in the background against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and food vendors

events.description: passing steam vents releasing white vapor on the right side of the sidewalk
navigating around pedestrians while maintaining pace behind the NCPD officer

agents.ego_description: following the NCPD officer along the sidewalk, passing various neon-lit storefronts and food vendors while avoiding oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and tie walking toward the camera
vendor standing near food cart with white umbrella

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading 'UP N' SMOKE' mounted on building facade
purple neon sign with a woman's face and 'TEMPT' text
street food vendor stall with large white umbrella and various items displayed
ground-level ventilation grate emitting white steam onto the sidewalk
traditional red spherical lanterns hanging outside storefront

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling commercial sidewalk lined with vibrant neon signs including 'UP N' SMOKE' and 'TEMPT', the character follows the NCPD officer past food vendors and steam vents. The crowd density increases with pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, and the atmosphere is dominated by artificial neon lighting against the fading natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor under highway overpass with large digital billboards

events.description: entering darker area beneath the concrete overpass as natural light is blocked
approaching the dark tunnel entrance at the end of the overpass corridor

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass toward the hotel entrance and continuing into the darker corridor ahead

entered.detail: large blue illuminated sign reading 'HOTEL' with Japanese characters and 'Cartwright' underneath
massive digital billboard displaying advertisement with woman and 'BOTTOMS UP' text
green neon arrow sign with '24 時間営業' (24 hours) Japanese text
massive concrete highway overpass structure overhead and along the right side
orange and white striped plastic construction barriers along the left side
neon sign with horse skull graphic and 'EL GUARRO' text

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under a massive concrete highway overpass into a darker, sheltered corridor. Large digital billboards including one for 'HOTEL Cartwright' and 'BOTTOMS UP' dominate the walls, while green neon signs indicate 24-hour businesses. The lighting shifts to predominantly artificial as the character approaches a dark tunnel entrance at the end of the walkway, with construction barriers lining the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown district that transitions from a bright commercial sidewalk into a dark, sheltered underpass. It begins on a covered walkway beside a teal building with large digital billboards, moving past seated individuals and a metal railing under the mixed glow of the setting sun and artificial lights. As the camera turns right, the scene opens into an exposed intersection where it follows an NCPD officer across a yellow-striped crosswalk while a red sports car passes by. The movement then shifts back toward a bustling sidewalk lined with vibrant neon signs and steam vents, weaving through an increasing crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the environment narrows as the camera moves beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, where the lighting becomes predominantly artificial and the path leads past construction barriers toward a dark tunnel entrance.
